rows.label: qev085502_MSG0001
rows.name:
It's no good. I can't win with a weapon
like this. I need a more powerful weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_JNK0010
rows.name: Support

rows.label: qev085502_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod in agreement.

rows.label: qev085502_JNK0020
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev085502_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if it's really the weapon's fault.

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0002
rows.name: I knew it. Attack power is everything, right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0003
rows.name: Is that really so?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0004
rows.name: What do you mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0005
rows.name:
Of course it is. The more powerful it
is, the better. Isn't that obvious?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0006
rows.name: Gwin, that is incorrect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0007
rows.name: Why is that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0008
rows.name:
Lin, what did you think watching
the mock battle just now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0009
rows.name: Um—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0010
rows.name: It's fine, you can be honest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0011
rows.name:
Yes. Rather than you using the weapon, it
felt more like you were being used by it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0012
rows.name: Being used?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0013
rows.name:
This is a mechanic's perspective, but no
matter how high-performance a tool is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0014
rows.name:
If you can't handle the basics properly,
it actually ends up taking more time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0015
rows.name: What Lin just said is everything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0016
rows.name:
What you need right now isn't a powerful weapon,
but the knowledge of how to handle one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0017
rows.name:
If you cannot do that, no matter how powerful the
weapon you use, it will just be pearls before swine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0018
rows.name:
How to handle it... I had
never even considered that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0019
rows.name:
Let us start by hammering those
fundamentals into your body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0020
rows.name:
I will prepare the optimal
weapon for you, so wait here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085502_MSG0021
rows.name: Yes, thank you very much, Colonel Elma.[ST:wait ]
